channel.title: Meter AI - Release Changelog & Technical Updates
channel.description: Stay updated with the latest releases, security updates, and performance optimizations for the Meter AI browser extension.

item.title: Meter AI v1.0.0 Stable Production Release
item.description: We are proud to announce the stable production release of Meter AI v1.0.0! This release introduces real-time Claude.ai session and context window tracking, live remaining prompt predictions, a local-first history engine, and the Context Bridge supporting conversation handoffs to ChatGPT, Gemini, and Grok.
